description: Environment setup - install dependencies and verify the project builds and existing tests pass
steps: Run npx tsc --noEmit to confirm TypeScript compiles without errors
Run npx vitest --run to confirm existing tests pass
acceptance_criteria: npx vitest --run reports all tests passing
findings: Node.js was not pre-installed; installed via mise (node@20.20.2). Fixed pre-existing TS errors in dashboard-routes.ts (req.params.id typed as string | string[] by newer @types/express-serve-static-core). Fixed pre-existing test failures in sheet-poller.test.ts where implementation was a local-only no-op but tests expected sheet writes with retry logic. Use 'eval "$(mise activate bash)"' before npm/node commands.
